official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound set_cursor_item body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_cursor_item to packet id 0x60.
The generated fixture uses ItemStack.EMPTY only.
Official ItemStack.OPTIONAL_STREAM_CODEC writes VarInt count 0 for ItemStack.EMPTY and only decodes item registry/component patch data for positive counts.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded empty-item value, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove non-empty ItemStack, item registry, component patch, inventory UI behavior, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer non-empty ItemStack, item registry, component patch, inventory UI behavior, or client-load completion.
